title: Hung Vuong High School for the Gifted
detail: Admitted to the Computer Science specialized class at Hung Vuong High School for the Gifted (Gia Lai), building a strong foundation in algorithmic thinking.

title: 3rd Prize in Science & Tech Contest
detail: Won 3rd Prize in the School-level Science & Technology Contest with an innovative technology application project.

title: Excellent Student Contest in CS
detail: Selected member of the City-level competitive programming team (Group A) in Computer Science.

title: Computer Science at HCMUTE
detail: Began pursuing Bachelor's in Computer Science at HCMC University of Technology and Education (HCMUTE) with focus on backend and information security.

title: Vibe Code Semifinalist
detail: Reached the Semifinals of Vibe Code Competitive Programming Contest, competing in algorithmic challenges against hundreds of students.

title: AI Agentic Builder Week — ASEAN Hackathon
detail: Participated in the premier regional ASEAN Hackathon, designing and co-developing a functional AI Agent solution within a 48-hour sprint.
